queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account functions as a credit risk driver that reduces default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of default probability associated with the magnitude of the requested credit amount and its contribution to increased credit risk exposure.
Empirical analysis of how extended loan duration in months serves as a credit risk driver that elevates the likelihood of borrower default.
